name: SEC Press Releases RSS
notes: Official SEC news releases; high value for ETF/enforcement/regulatory catalysts.

name: SEC Litigation Releases RSS
notes: Official SEC litigation releases; bearish/regulatory-risk context when crypto-related.

name: Federal Reserve Press Releases RSS
notes: Official Fed press feed; macro and rate-policy context.

name: Federal Reserve Speeches RSS
notes: Official Fed speeches/testimony feed; used as event-risk context, not standalone direction.

name: Ethereum Foundation Blog
notes: Official Ethereum Foundation blog feed for protocol/security/upgrade items.

name: Coinbase Blog RSS
notes: Coinbase official Medium/blog feed; useful for company/product/listing context.

name: Binance Announcements
notes: Binance official announcement page backend; used defensively and allowed to fail if format changes.

name: CoinDesk RSS
notes: Reputable crypto media context only; lower priority than official sources.
